case_title: VALERIO, JAMISON VS LIN, CRYSTAL et al

docket_entries.description: TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST BOTH DEFTS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,081.65 FILED BY VALERIO, JAMISON AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, CRYSTAL FELLOWES, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-10-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JAN-29-1997 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, CRYSTAL FELLOWES, ROBERT MEDIATED STIPULATION-PARTIES AGREE THAT THE DEFTS PAID PLFT THE SUM OF $950 IN COURT; PARTIES TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
